title: aster calvatus
intro: Aster calvatus, also known as California aster, is a type of flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster calvatus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Aster calvatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
